title: taraxacum scotophyllum
intro: Taraxacum scotophyllum, also known as the Scottish dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant contains medicinal properties, including sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum scotophyllum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tincture, and infusion, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
